domain: music aesthetics (FMA CLAP-PCA embeddings) -- a2_probe reconciliation of the existing signflip_music.json
consumer: genre classification (16 genres); held-out logistic-regression acc 0.680 (majority 0.292) -- a working angular consumer

a2_diagnostics.regime: ISOTROPIC-angular (moral-like; NOT the direction-concentration regime of legal/KV-keys)

reconciliation: signflip_music.json (6-sigma negative-quadratic flip on CLAP-PCA compression) is the ISOTROPIC-ANGULAR regime: angular families (polar/whitened) preserve the genre-logit ranking better than recon-oriented per-channel at heavy compression -> the flip is visible to a generic angular code (moral-like, not legal/KV-keys concentration). New SPD-whitened candidate competitive (tops at bits=1).
note: exploratory reconciliation; signflip used listens/favorites aesthetic rating, this uses genre -- both angular consumers on the same CLAP embeddings.
